title: OpenAI credential test error despite valid API key
symptom: Users encounter a 'credential test error' when trying to connect OpenAI credentials, even though the API key is valid. This error may cause confusion as workflows can still execute successfully.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or integration
root_cause: This issue appears to be a bug in n8n where the credential test fails even when the API key is valid. The error message may mislead users into thinking their credentials are incorrect, while workflows can still function normally.
fix_steps: Ignore the credential test error message
Proceed to trigger the workflow with the valid API key
Consider using the OpenAI Chat Model node as an alternative if issues persist
agent_instruction: Ignore the credential test error and trigger the workflow with the valid API key.
